query:
-- matches: Spalten die nullable waren auf NOT NULL setzen (Daten sind sauber)
ALTER TABLE matches
  MODIFY COLUMN type enum('singles','doubles','mixed') NOT NULL,
  MODIFY COLUMN player1_id int NOT NULL,
  MODIFY COLUMN player3_id int NOT NULL,
  MODIFY COLUMN winning_side int NOT NULL;
